_comment: REST payload template for gold ValueSets (flexfield value set VALUES). Not a loadable file: value set VALUES are created one-per-POST via the Fusion REST API, not via an FBDI/FBL file. This documents the exact request bodies the harness (harness/load_rest_vsv.py) sends to POST /fscmRestApi/resources/11.13.18.05/valueSets/{ValueSetCode}/child/values. ${VS_CODE} is a discovered existing editable independent value set (URL-encoded into the path); ${PREFIX} is the fresh numeric run prefix.

values.Description: DMT gold bad value ${PREFIX} exceeds MaximumSize -> HTTP 400 FND-2825
